results.name: hatebear
results.description: Creatures that are low-cost (2 MV or less) and have low-power/toughness with relevant effects that may disrupt an opponent's strategy. These are traditionally associated with white.

results.name: hatebird
results.description: (Usually) 3 MV flying creatures that mirror the lower-costed [hatebears](hatebear).

results.name: hate-color
results.description: Color hate for one or more colors. See also [hate-colorless](/tags/card/hate-colorless).

results.name: hate-color-choose
results.description: Color hate where you choose a color to hate on.

results.name: hate-colored
results.description: Color hate for cards that are any color at all.

results.name: hate-colorless
results.description: Hate on colorless cards. See also [hate-color](/tags/card/hate-color) for color hate.

results.name: hate-counters
results.description: Cards that hate on counters (the gameplay marker).

results.name: hate-damaged
results.description: Cards that do stuff to things that have already received damage.

results.name: hate-discard
results.description: Your opponent had better think twice before targeting you with that [Mind Rot](https://tagger.scryfall.com/card/ori/281)!

results.name: hate empty hand
results.description: Cards that punish opponents for having few or no cards in hand. For cards that care about their controller's hand being empty, see [hellbent](hellbent) and [heckbent](heckbent).

results.name: hate full hand
results.description: Cards that punish an opponent for having lots of cards in hand.

results.name: hate-high-pt
results.description: Cards that specifically hate on cards with high power or toughness, typically at least 3-4.

results.name: hate-named
results.description: Hate a specific card of your choice. Yes, that one.

results.name: hate-planeswalker
results.description: Effects that specifically answer or are better against planeswalkers. This does not include effects that happen to trigger whether its a player or planeswalker and don't help remove the planeswalker.
